ayahArabic: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allāh, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

ayahArabic: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allāh, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لِمَ تَقُولُونَ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: O you who have believed, why do you say what you do not do?

targetTranslation: they believed (referring to ٱلَّذِينَ - those who)

ayahEnglish: O you who have believed, why do you say what you do not do?

ayahArabic: كَبُرَ مَقْتًا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ أَن تَقُولُوا۟ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Greatly hateful in the sight of Allāh is that you say what you do not do.

targetTranslation: hatred (as something greatly disliked by Allah)

targetTranslation: Allah (as the object of يُحِبُّ - loves)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُقٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِهِۦ صَفًّا كَأَنَّهُم بُنْيٰنٌ مَّرْصُوصٌ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, Allāh loves those who fight in His cause in a row as though they are a [single] structure joined firmly.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُقٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِهِۦ صَفًّا كَأَنَّهُم بُنْيٰنٌ مَّرْصُوصٌ

ayahEnglish: Indeed, Allāh loves those who fight in His cause in a row as though they are a [single] structure joined firmly.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِۦ يٰقَوْمِ لِمَ تُؤْذُونَنِى وَقَد تَّعْلَمُونَ أَنِّى رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ إِلَيْكُمْ فَلَمَّا زَاغُوٓا۟ أَزَاغَ ٱللَّهُ قُلُوبَهُمْ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلْفٰسِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when Moses said to his people, "O my people, why do you harm me while you certainly know that I am the messenger of Allāh to you?" And when they deviated, Allāh caused their hearts to deviate. And Allāh does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ إِنِّى رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ إِلَيْكُم مُّصَدِّقًا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَىَّ مِنَ ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةِ وَمُبَشِّرًۢا بِرَسُولٍ يَأْتِى مِنۢ بَعْدِى ٱسْمُهُۥٓ أَحْمَدُ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ قَالُوا۟ هٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] when Jesus, the son of Mary, said, "O Children of Israel, indeed I am the messenger of Allāh to you confirming what came before me of the Torah and bringing good tidings of a messenger to come after me, whose name is Aḥmad." But when he came to them with clear evidences, they said, "This is obvious magic."

targetTranslation: Jesus (son of Mary, mentioned in قَالَ)

targetTranslation: more/most unjust (describing someone who invents lies against Allah)
ayahArabic: وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلْكَذِبَ وَهُوَ يُدْعَىٰٓ إِلَى ٱلْإِسْلٰمِ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allāh untruth while he is being invited to Islām. And Allāh does not guide the wrongdoing people.

targetTranslation: one who completes (subject of نُورِهِۦ - His light)

ayahArabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَرْسَلَ رَسُولَهُۥ بِٱلْهُدَىٰ وَدِينِ ٱلْحَقِّ لِيُظْهِرَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلدِّينِ كُلِّهِۦ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ٱلْمُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is He who sent His Messenger with guidance and the religion of truth to manifest it over all religion, although those who associate others with Allāh dislike it.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ هَلْ أَدُلُّكُمْ عَلَىٰ تِجٰرَةٍ تُنجِيكُم مِّنْ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: O you who have believed, shall I guide you to a transaction that will save you from a painful punishment?

ayahArabic: تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَتُجٰهِدُونَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ بِأَمْوٰلِكُمْ وَأَنفُسِكُمْ ذٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: [It is that] you believe in Allāh and His Messenger and strive in the cause of Allāh with your wealth and your lives. That is best for you, if you only knew.

targetTranslation: he forgives/will forgive (connected to يُدْخِلْ - he will admit)
ayahArabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ذُنُوبَكُمْ وَيُدْخِلْكُمْ جَنَّاتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ وَمَسٰكِنَ طَيِّبَةً فِى جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
ayahEnglish: He will forgive for you your sins and admit you to gardens beneath which rivers flow and pleasant dwellings in gardens of perpetual residence. That is the great attainment.

ayahEnglish: And [you will obtain] another [favor] that you love - victory from Allāh and an imminent conquest; and give good tidings to the believers.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ كُونُوٓا۟ أَنصَارَ ٱللَّهِ كَمَا قَالَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ لِلْحَوَارِيِّۦنَ مَنْ أَنصَارِىٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ قَالَ ٱلْحَوَارِيُّونَ نَحْنُ أَنصَارُ ٱللَّهِ فَـَٔامَنَت طَّآئِفَةٌ مِّنۢ بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ وَكَفَرَت طَّآئِفَةٌ فَأَيَّدْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ عَلَىٰ عَدُوِّهِمْ فَأَصْبَحُوا۟ ظٰهِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: O you who have believed, be supporters of Allāh, as when Jesus, the son of Mary, said to the disciples, "Who are my supporters for Allāh?"
